name: Capucine
dev_strap: Terraced hillside residences above the Ionian
sub: A first-floor one-bedroom apartment with its own private patio at the centre of Green Coast, Palasë.
description: A first-floor one-bedroom apartment with its own private patio, opening the living space to the Riviera air at the centre of Green Coast, Palasë. Compact, efficient and outdoor-facing — with the resort's plaza, pools and Blue Flag beach moments away.
highlights: Quiet western edge, hillside greenery behind
Pools & Blue Flag beach below the resort
location_body: Green Coast is the Albanian Riviera's most established resort address — a stone-built village above the Blue Flag beach at Palasë, where the Ceraunian mountains meet the Ionian. Mediterranean architecture in local stone, travertine and timber; promenades, pools, restaurants and a beach club below; the life of the coast a few steps from the door.
position_copy: Capucine holds the quiet western edge of the village, with the greenery of the hillside at its back. The parking entrance is a short walk east, the central plaza and the hotel's services just beyond it, and the paths down to the beach begin at the village edge.
